title: Unique Dark - Green Interface
description: Add-On for Unique Dark | Green Themed User Interface
body:
A small **addon for the [Unique Dark](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/unique-dark) resource pack** that adds subtle green highlights to buttons when hovered.  
Designed to keep the familiar dark aesthetic of Unique Dark while giving the interface a fresh, modern touch of green.

***

Features

*   Adds a green hover effect to buttons in menus and interfaces.
*   Keeps the original Unique Dark look and feel - only adds color feedback.
*   Works seamlessly with Unique Dark and its addons.
*   Compatible with most modded GUIs that use the same base UI.

***

Requires Unique Dark  
  
All credits for the base UI go to [amongstreality](https://modrinth.com/user/amongstreality)

***
